summary: The meeting was a weekly architecture sync focused on database migration and infrastructure issues. Key decisions included migrating to PostgreSQL for core application data. Zain Sarwar committed to writing the data migration scripts this weekend, while Sarah Ahmed committed to updating the caching layer by next Wednesday. A critical blocker involves the DevOps team not provisioning the necessary staging servers, preventing schema design work. Urgent action was assigned to Ali to escalate and resolve this issue by tomorrow. Additional tasks included updating the frontend login flow by Friday.
